title: Rebrand site to 'Rahul Cyber Cafe' across all pages and SEO

requirements.summary: Update the business name to 'Rahul Cyber Cafe' across all frontend files where the cafe's name appears, including Navbar, Footer, Home page hero, Contact page, and any other in-page text that references the business name.
acceptanceCriteria: Navbar logo/brand text displays 'Rahul Cyber Cafe'
Footer brand name displays 'Rahul Cyber Cafe'
Home page hero heading includes 'Rahul Cyber Cafe'
Contact page business name displays 'Rahul Cyber Cafe'
No page shows the old generic name 'Internet Cafe Services' or 'Internet Cafe' as the business name

file_operations.description: Update the logo/brand text in the Navbar component to display 'Rahul Cyber Cafe' instead of any generic placeholder or 'Internet Cafe'.
Update the brand name in the Footer component to display 'Rahul Cyber Cafe' in the brand info section instead of any generic placeholder.
Update the hero section heading and any business name references on the Home page to display 'Rahul Cyber Cafe' instead of 'Internet Cafe' or generic placeholders.
Update the business name display on the Contact page to show 'Rahul Cyber Cafe' instead of any generic placeholder.

requirements.summary: Update all SEO metadata site-wide to use 'Rahul Cyber Cafe' as the business name in title tags, meta descriptions, Open Graph tags, Twitter cards, JSON-LD structured data, and per-page SEOHead calls following the pattern 'Rahul Cyber Cafe — [Page Subtitle]'.
acceptanceCriteria: og:title and og:site_name contain 'Rahul Cyber Cafe'
JSON-LD LocalBusiness 'name' field is 'Rahul Cyber Cafe'
Home page SEO title contains 'Rahul Cyber Cafe'
Services page SEO title contains 'Rahul Cyber Cafe'
Contact page SEO title contains 'Rahul Cyber Cafe'
All meta descriptions reference 'Rahul Cyber Cafe' by name

file_operations.description: Update the <title> tag to include 'Rahul Cyber Cafe'. Update all meta description, Open Graph (og:title, og:site_name), and Twitter card metadata to reference 'Rahul Cyber Cafe'. Update the JSON-LD LocalBusiness structured data 'name' field to 'Rahul Cyber Cafe'.
Update the SEOHead component call to set the page title following the pattern 'Rahul Cyber Cafe — [Home subtitle]' and ensure the meta description references 'Rahul Cyber Cafe' by name.
Update the SEOHead component call to set the page title following the pattern 'Rahul Cyber Cafe — [Services subtitle]' and ensure the meta description references 'Rahul Cyber Cafe' by name.
Update the SEOHead component call to set the page title following the pattern 'Rahul Cyber Cafe — [Contact subtitle]' and ensure the meta description references 'Rahul Cyber Cafe' by name.
